summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that review summary packets aggregate explicit numeric telemetry from variant result packets.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only review-variant summary telemetry aggregation is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Held-out or full-gate report telemetry aggregation
Telemetry inferred from raw logs or stderr

notableAssertions: two review variant result packets emit explicit telemetry
review-summary telemetry aggregates variantCount and passedVariantCount
review-summary telemetry sums prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, and cost_usd
review-summary telemetry exposes unique provider and model lists

decision.reason: The cited CLI smoke test proves explicit per-variant telemetry is lifted into the top-level review summary packet without scraping each verdict file after the fact.
